postStartCommand.agent-runner-telemetry: sh -lc 'cd "${containerWorkspaceFolder}" 2>/dev/null || cd "$PWD"; if command -v agent-runner >/dev/null 2>&1; then agent-runner -C "$PWD" telemetry start; elif [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/agent-runner ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/agent-runner -C "$PWD" telemetry start; elif [ -f ./dist/cli.js ]; then node ./dist/cli.js -C "$PWD" telemetry start; else echo "agent-runner telemetry autostart skipped: CLI not found" >&2; fi' || true
